name: Flightradar24 MCP Server
what_it_does: Flightradar24 MCP server enabling AI agents to query real-time flight data from Flightradar24 — tracking aircraft positions, getting flight status and route information, querying airport data, monitoring specific flights, and integrating live aviation data into agent workflows. Useful for travel, logistics, and aviation-related agent applications.
use_cases: Tracking specific flight status and position from travel coordination agents
Monitoring airport arrivals and departures from logistics agents
Providing real-time aviation data for travel assistant agents
Tracking cargo flight status from supply chain agents
Alerting on flight delays or cancellations from notification agents
Providing context about aircraft and routes for aviation research agents
not_for: Official airline or airport systems requiring authoritative data (use airline APIs directly)
Safety-critical aviation applications (Flightradar24 data is for informational purposes only)
Commercial redistribution of flight data (verify Flightradar24 ToS for usage)
best_when: A travel assistant or logistics agent needs real-time flight tracking data — checking where a specific flight is, when it will arrive, or whether it's delayed.
avoid_when: You need official authoritative flight data for operational use — use airline or airport APIs directly for mission-critical aviation applications.

auth.notes: Flightradar24 public data may not require API key for basic queries. FR24 Business API requires API key for higher rate limits and additional data. Community MCPs may scrape public data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public flight data access; limited rate
pricing.paid_tiers: Flightradar24 Business API for commercial use and higher limits
pricing.notes: Basic flight tracking data is publicly available. Business API requires subscription. Verify usage terms for your use case — commercial use typically requires Business API license.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits on public data scraping; Business API has documented limits

known_agent_gotchas: Flightradar24 data is ADS-B based — some aircraft don't broadcast (military, private jets with privacy mode)
FR24 ToS restricts commercial use of scraped data — verify licensing for your use case
Community MCP may use web scraping rather than official API — fragile if FR24 changes structure
Real-time data — latency and coverage varies by region
Flight data accuracy is generally good but not guaranteed for safety-critical use
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. Public aviation data. No sensitive data involved. Verify FR24 ToS for intended use — commercial use requires Business API. Not for safety-critical aviation decisions.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Public data. No sensitive data. Verify FR24 ToS for commercial use. Not authoritative for safety-critical aviation decisions.
